releases.author: banisterious
releases.description:
## Map View Enhancements

**Draggable Place Markers**
Place markers on custom maps can now be repositioned by dragging. Simply click and drag any marker to adjust its location - changes are saved automatically.

**Place Marker Context Menu**
Right-click any place marker to access quick actions:
- Open the linked place note
- Edit place properties
- Remove the marker from the map

## New: Custom Map Authoring Wizard

Create custom image-based maps directly within Obsidian using a step-by-step wizard:

1. **Image Selection** - Choose any image from your vault as the map background
2. **Map Configuration** - Set the map name and select a universe
3. **Place Marker Placement** - Click on the image to position markers, with live preview and drag-to-reposition support
4. **Review & Create** - Preview your configuration before finalizing

Access via the Control Center → Maps tab → "Create Custom Map" button.

## Bug Fixes

- Fixed "Add essential Event properties" command adding deprecated `person` property instead of `persons` array (#69)
- Fixed Map View toolbar buttons overflowing when sidebar is open
releases.name: Canvas Roots v0.18.10

releases.author: banisterious
releases.description:
## Nested Properties Redesign

This release fixes compatibility issues with Obsidian's Properties panel by redesigning two features that previously used nested YAML structures.

### ✨ Highlights

#### Flat Evidence Tracking Properties
The nested `sourced_facts` object is replaced with individual flat properties:

```yaml
# Before (caused "Type mismatch" warnings)
sourced_facts:
  birth_date:
    sources:
      - "[[Census 1870]]"

# After (Properties panel compatible)
sourced_birth_date:
  - "[[Census 1870]]"
```

10 supported fact types: `sourced_birth_date`, `sourced_death_date`, `sourced_birth_place`, `sourced_death_place`, `sourced_name`, `sourced_sex`, `sourced_occupation`, `sourced_parents`, `sourced_spouse`, `sourced_children`

#### Life Events as Separate Notes
Inline `events` arrays are replaced with links to dedicated event note files:

```yaml
# Before (nested array)
events:
  - event_type: residence
    place: "[[New York]]"
    date_from: "1920"

# After (wikilinks to event notes)
life_events:
  - "[[John Smith - Residence 1920]]"
```

Event notes are first-class Obsidian notes with full frontmatter, tags, and attachments.

#### Custom Relationships on Canvas Trees
Custom relationship types now use flat properties and can optionally appear on family trees:
- Flat format: `godparent: ["[[John Smith]]"]`, `godparent_id: ["john_123"]`
- New `includeOnFamilyTree` and `familyGraphMapping` settings per relationship type

### 🧹 Cleanup Wizard

Expanded to **13 steps** with two new migrations:
- **Step 12**: Migrate `sourced_facts` → flat `sourced_*` properties
- **Step 13**: Migrate inline `events` → separate event note files

A migration notice appears on first launch to guide you through the process.

### 🔧 Bug Fixes

- **Standardized `children` property** - Fixed duplicate `child` and `children` properties appearing in YAML when adding parents via context menu ([#65](https://github.com/banisterious/obsidian-canvas-roots/issues/65))

### ⚠️ Migration Notes

- **Backward compatible**: The plugin reads both old and new formats
- **Migration optional but recommended**: Use the Cleanup Wizard to migrate at your convenience
- **No data loss**: Old properties are preserved until you run the migration

### 📚 Documentation

- [Nested Properties Redesign](https://github.com/banisterious/obsidian-canvas-roots/wiki/Release-History#nested-properties-redesign-v0189) - Full feature documentation
- [Cleanup Wizard](https://github.com/banisterious/obsidian-canvas-roots/wiki/Data-Quality#post-import-cleanup-wizard) - Step-by-step guide
releases.name: Canvas Roots v0.18.9

releases.author: banisterious
releases.description:
## Added
- **Inline media folder configuration** - When uploading media with no folder configured, an inline folder picker now appears instead of just showing an error notice. Set the folder directly in the modal and continue uploading.

## Fixed
- **Context menu relationship actions** - "Add father/mother/spouse/child" now correctly write both wikilink and ID fields (dual storage pattern), fixing bidirectional linking
- **Metadata cache timing** - Pass cr_id directly when selecting newly created people, avoiding cache timing issues that caused "could not find cr_id" errors
- **Family chart view stability** - Chart no longer becomes unusable when returning to the tab after modifying other notes. The view now defers refresh until visible and preserves zoom/pan state during refreshes
releases.name: Canvas Roots v0.18.8

releases.author: banisterious
releases.description:
## New Feature: Inclusive Parent Relationships

Gender-neutral parent support for diverse family structures. This opt-in feature allows you to represent families with nonbinary parents or use customizable terminology (e.g., "Parents", "Guardians", "Progenitors") that fits your needs. Enable it in Control Center > Preferences to add a `parents` field to person notes, with full support for bidirectional linking, family tree visualization, and relationship displays.

**Key features:**
- Opt-in toggle (disabled by default)
- Customizable field label
- Works alongside existing father/mother fields
- Automatic bidirectional linking to children
- Full integration with Family Chart View and relationship blocks

---

## Bug Fixes
- **#59**: Fixed map crash when rendering locations with year-only dates
- **#61**: Include adoptive and step-parents in family trees by default
- **#62**: Add bidirectional linking for adoptive and step-parent relationships

---

**Installation:** Update through Obsidian's Community Plugins settings or download from the [releases page](https://github.com/banisterious/obsidian-canvas-roots/releases/tag/0.18.7).
releases.name: Canvas Roots v0.18.7

releases.author: banisterious
releases.description:
This release delivers three major workflow enhancements and important bug fixes.

## What's New

**Media Upload & Management**
Upload files directly from Canvas Roots without manual vault management. Drag-and-drop folders to set upload destination, use the new 6-tile Media Manager dashboard, and link media to entities in either direction (media-first or entity-first). Entity picker includes person-specific filters and sorting.

**Inline "Create New" Buttons**
Create entities directly from picker modals. Relationship context menus now show "Create new father/mother/spouse/child" buttons with sex pre-filled. Event creation uses picker modals with inline creation for people and places. Streamlines workflows from 3 steps down to 1.

**Split Parent Actions**
Context menu now shows separate "Add father" and "Add mother" options instead of prompting with an intermediate modal, eliminating an extra step.

## Bug Fixes

- **Research gaps counting**: Fixed inflated unsourced facts count for people not using GPS tracking
- **Timeline person filter**: Now properly matches events using the `persons` array field
- **Events view**: Person column now displays all linked people from both `person` and `persons` fields

[Full changelog](https://github.com/banisterious/obsidian-canvas-roots/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md#0186---2025-12-29)
releases.name: Canvas Roots v0.18.6

releases.author: banisterious
releases.description:
This release fixes critical bugs in family relationship linking and data quality checking.

## Bug Fixes

### Bidirectional Linking for Spouse's Children

Fixed a critical regression where children added to a parent would not be automatically linked to the parent's spouse.

**Before:** When you created Father, added Mother as spouse, then added children, only Father would be linked to the children. Mother's `children_id` array would remain empty, and children would only have Father set as a parent.

**After:** All family members are now correctly linked bidirectionally. Both parents get the child in their `children_id` arrays, and children get both parents set.

**Technical details:** The background `BidirectionalLinker` service was interfering by removing relationships immediately after creation. The fix suspends this service during manual relationship updates and automatically detects and links the spouse when adding children.

### Double Bracket Accumulation

Fixed a bug where child names would accumulate multiple layers of brackets (e.g., `[[[[Child Name]]]]`) when relationships were updated multiple times.

### Data Quality False Warnings

Fixed false warnings for intentional schema-defined nested structures used in GPS (Genealogical Proof Standard) research tracking.

**Before:** Using `sourced_facts` or `evidence` properties would trigger "Property contains nested structure" warnings, and running the cleanup wizard would flatten these properties, breaking the Evidence Service.

**After:** These properties are now whitelisted and won't trigger warnings. The cleanup wizard skips them, preserving Evidence Service functionality.

**Example that now works without warnings:**
```yaml
sourced_facts:
  residence:
    sources:
      - "[[1870-census]]"
      - "[[1880-census]]"
```

### UI Fix

- Added "Link" text label to the spouse link button in the create person modal (was previously showing only an icon).
releases.name: Canvas Roots v0.18.5

releases.author: banisterious
releases.description:
Critical bug fix for relationship linking and a major CSS architecture refactoring to improve maintainability.

## Critical Bug Fix

**Bidirectional Relationship Linking** - Fixed a critical bug where creating family members would only create one-way relationship links. Previously, if you created a person and added a parent, only the child's note would be updated—the parent's `children_id` array remained empty. This affected all parent-child and spouse relationships created through the Create Person modal.

**What's fixed:**
- ✅ Creating a person with parents now updates the parent's `children_id` array automatically
- ✅ Adding children to a person now updates each child's `father_id`/`mother_id` fields
- ✅ Post-create "Add Another" actions (Add child, Add spouse, Add parent) now properly maintain bidirectional links
- ✅ Spouse relationships refactored to use proper dual storage (wikilink + cr_id)

This ensures family relationships are always bidirectional across all creation flows, not just for spouse relationships.

## CSS Architecture Refactoring

Improved maintainability and organization of the plugin's CSS codebase:

**Split massive `modals.css`** (12,488 lines) into 6 focused component files:
- `control-center.css` - Core Control Center UI (tabs, navigation, cards)
- `import-export-wizard.css` - Import/Export wizard modals
- `cleanup-wizard.css` - Cleanup wizard with all 9 steps
- `media-modals.css` - Media picker, manager, gallery, bulk link modals
- `place-modals.css` - Place creation, standardization, merge, and network modals
- `entity-create-modals.css` - Person picker and entity creation forms

**Removed 5 empty/unused CSS files** - Deleted `canvas.css`, `edges.css`, `theme.css`, `nodes.css`, and `animations.css`

**Resolved CSS conflicts:**
- Fixed duplicate `.cr-progress-bar` definition (now uses modifier classes)
- Fixed duplicate `.crc-field-list` definitions (converted to scoped selectors)
- Consolidated `.cr-modal-buttons` to single base definition

---

## Installation

Update via Obsidian's Community Plugins tab, or download manually from the [releases page](https://github.com/banisterious/obsidian-canvas-roots/releases/tag/0.18.4).

## Feedback

Report issues at https://github.com/banisterious/obsidian-canvas-roots/issues
releases.name: Canvas Roots v0.18.4

releases.author: banisterious
releases.description:
Bug fix release addressing wikilink handling and property naming issues.

## Fixed

### Wikilink Handling for Duplicate Names

The plugin now properly handles entities with duplicate names (e.g., "John Doe 1.md" for a person named "John Doe") using Obsidian's wikilink alias format `[[filename|display name]]`.

**Areas fixed:**
- **Bidirectional relationship linking** - Adding parents, spouses, or children to people with duplicate names
- **Note creation** - Person, event, place, and organization note writers
- **Importers** - GEDCOM, Gramps XML, GedcomX JSON, and CSV
- **Exporters** - GEDCOM, Gramps XML, and GedcomX JSON
- **Dynamic content blocks** - Timeline, relationships, and media gallery
- **Report generators** - Timeline, place summary, collection overview, and media inventory

### "Add Essential Properties" Property Name Fix

Fixed "Add essential source properties" and "Add essential event properties" context menu actions incorrectly setting `type` instead of `cr_type`. Person, place, and universe actions already used the correct property name.

Also updated place standardization and organization membership filtering to check both `cr_type` (preferred) and legacy `type` for backward compatibility.

---

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/banisterious/obsidian-canvas-roots/compare/0.18.2...0.18.3
releases.name: Canvas Roots v0.18.3

releases.author: banisterious
releases.description:
## Timeline Export Consolidation

All 8 timeline export formats are now available from a single location: **Statistics & Reports → Reports → Timeline**. This consolidates functionality that was previously split between the Events tab Export card and the Reports wizard.

### Unified Export Formats

| Category | Formats |
|----------|---------|
| Visual | Canvas, Excalidraw |
| Documents | PDF, ODT |
| Markdown | Vertical timeline (callouts), Table, Simple list, Dataview query |

### Consolidated Options

- **All filters** — Person, event type, group, place, universe, date range
- **Canvas/Excalidraw styling** — Layout, color scheme, ordering edges
- **Excalidraw drawing options** — Style, font, stroke width
- **PDF/ODT options** — Page size, date format, cover page
- **Grouping** — None, by year, by decade, by person, by place
- **Data quality insights** — Timeline gaps, unsourced events, orphan events

### Deprecation Notice

The Events tab Export card now displays a notice directing users to the unified Reports wizard. The Export card will be removed in a future release.

---

## Bug Fixes

- **Restored "Open in family chart" context menu action** - Re-added the missing menu item for person notes under the Canvas Roots submenu
- **Excalidraw timeline exports** — Event nodes now display formatted labels (e.g., "BIRTH of John Smith (1850)") instead of raw file paths
- **Excalidraw text positioning** — Text labels are now properly centered within rectangles
releases.name: Canvas Roots v0.18.2

releases.author: banisterious
releases.description:
## Create Person Enhancements

This release focuses on streamlining person creation and family building workflows.

### Family Creation Wizard

New 5-step wizard for creating interconnected family groups:

1. Choose mode: start from scratch or build around an existing person
2. Create or select the central person
3. Add spouses (create new or pick existing)
4. Add children (create new or pick existing)
5. Add parents (create new or pick existing)
6. Review and create with automatic bidirectional relationship linking

Access via command palette, Dashboard tile, People tab actions, or folder context menu.

### Inline Person Creation

Create new people directly from the Edit Modal without leaving your current workflow:

- Click the "+" button next to any relationship field (spouse, father, mother, children)
- Enter basic details in a mini-form
- New person is created and linked automatically

### Children Management

New "Children" section in the Edit Modal:
- View existing children with clickable links
- Add children via person picker or inline creation
- Stored using `child` and `children_id` array properties

### Additional Improvements

- **"Add Another" flow** - Create multiple people in sequence with "Create & Add Another" button
- **Nickname property** - New `nickname` frontmatter field displayed in Edit Modal header
- **Folder context menu** - Right-click people folders to create persons or families directly
- **State persistence** - Family Wizard progress is saved if accidentally closed

---

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/banisterious/obsidian-canvas-roots/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md
releases.name: Canvas Roots v0.18.1

releases.author: banisterious
releases.description:
## Event Person Property Consolidation

This release consolidates the dual `person`/`persons` event properties into a single unified `persons` array format for all event types.

### What Changed

Previously, event notes used two different properties:
- `person` (string) for single-participant events like birth, death, occupation
- `persons` (array) for multi-participant events like marriage, divorce

Now all events use the `persons` array:

```yaml
# Single-participant event
persons:
  - "[[John Smith]]"

# Multi-participant event  
persons:
  - "[[John Smith]]"
  - "[[Jane Doe]]"
```

### Benefits

- Consistency: One property to learn and use across all event types
- Flexibility: Any event can have multiple participants without schema changes
- Simpler queries: Easier filtering in Obsidian Bases and Dataview

### Migration

The legacy person property continues to be read for backward compatibility—your existing notes will still work. To migrate to the new format:

1. Open the Cleanup Wizard (Control Center → Data Quality, or command palette)
2. Navigate to Step 11: Migrate Event Person Properties
3. Review detected notes and click Apply All

New imports automatically use the persons array format.

### Upgrading

Users upgrading from v0.17.x will see a one-time migration notice with details and a link to the Cleanup Wizard.
releases.name: Canvas Roots v0.18.0

releases.author: banisterious
releases.description:
This release focuses on custom map improvements and import enhancements.

## New Features

- **"All places" layer in Map View** — New toggle in the Layers menu shows all places with coordinates, not just those referenced by person events. Especially useful for fictional worlds where places may not yet have associated person notes.
- **Pixel coordinate support in Create Place modal** — When creating fictional, mythological, or legendary places, the modal now shows pixel coordinate fields (X/Y) instead of geographic coordinates for use with pixel-based custom maps.
- **Wikilink support for custom map images** — Map image paths now support wikilink syntax (`[[path/to/image.png]]`), allowing Obsidian to automatically update paths when images are moved or renamed.
- **Map auto-refresh on note changes** — Maps automatically refresh when place or person notes are modified.

## Bug Fixes

- **Dynamic block order ignored during import** — Media block now correctly appears first in person notes when importing from GEDCOM or Gramps files.
- **Custom maps not appearing in gallery** — Fixed issue where newly created custom maps wouldn't appear in the Control Center Maps gallery.
- **Pixel coordinate format mismatch** — Places with pixel coordinates now appear correctly on custom maps.
releases.name: Canvas Roots v0.17.9

releases.author: banisterious
releases.description:
## Fixed

- **Gramps import: multiple events of same type silently skipped** - Fixed issue where multiple events of the same type with the same participants (e.g., several residence events for a married couple) would only import the first event. The filename now includes the event date to ensure uniqueness. ([#43](https://github.com/banisterious/obsidian-canvas-roots/issues/43))

---

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/banisterious/obsidian-canvas-roots/compare/v0.17.7...v0.17.8

releases.author: banisterious
releases.description:
## Changed

- **Create Person modal crash with array collection property** - Fixed TypeError when opening Create Person modal if a person note has an array-type `collection` property instead of a string. The modal now safely handles arrays by using the first element.
- **Events base: unified Person(s) column** - The events base template now uses a single "Person(s)" column that displays clickable links for both single-person events (`person` property) and multi-person events (`persons` property). Uses a Bases formula to coalesce the properties with comma separators.
releases.name: Canvas Roots v0.17.7

releases.author: banisterious
releases.description:
## Fixed

- **Gramps import: family events missing Person field** - Events with multiple participants (marriage, divorce, residence, etc.) now correctly populate the Person property when importing from Gramps. These events are attached to families rather than persons in Gramps XML, and are now properly linked to both spouses.

- **"Create person note" command opening retired tab** - The command palette "Canvas Roots: Create person note" command now directly opens the Create Person modal instead of attempting to open the retired Data Entry tab in Control Center.
releases.name: Canvas Roots v0.17.6

releases.author: banisterious
releases.description:
## Research Level Property

Track research progress on each ancestor using a 0-6 scale based on Yvette Hoitink's "Six Levels of Ancestral Profiles" system, supporting the GPS principle of "reasonably exhaustive research."

| Level | Name | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| 0 | Unidentified | Ancestor exists but no name established |
| 1 | Name Only | Name known, appears in others' records |
| 2 | Vital Statistics | Birth, marriage, death dates researched |
| 3 | Life Events | Occupations, residences, children documented |
| 4 | Extended Records | Property, military, legal records researched |
| 5 | GPS Complete | Exhaustive research, written proof summary |
| 6 | Biography | Full narrative with historical context |

**Features:**
- **Edit Modal Integration** — Select research level via dropdown when creating or editing person notes
- **Gaps Report Enhancements** — Filter by level (e.g., show only Level 0-2), sort by level, view summary statistics
- **Bases Views** — "By research level" grouped view, "Needs research" filter (Level ≤ 2), "Not assessed" filter
- **Full Import/Export** — Preserved in GEDCOM (`_RESEARCH_LEVEL`) and Gramps XML (`attribute type="Research Level"`) exports, automatically imported when present

**Opt-in Feature:** Research level tracking is part of the Evidence & Sources feature set. To enable it, go to **Settings → Canvas Roots → Research tools** and enable "Enable fact-level source tracking." The research level dropdown will then appear in the Create/Edit Person modal.

**Changed:**

- **Gramps .gpkg Import**: Added media folder selection with dropdown for configured folders or custom path entry

---

**Full Changelog:** https://github.com/banisterious/obsidian-canvas-roots/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md
releases.name: Canvas Roots v0.17.5

releases.author: banisterious
releases.description:
## Added

- **Statistics entry in Control Center Tools** — Statistics is now accessible from Control Center → Tools, providing an entry point to the Statistics View that was temporarily only available via command palette. (This remedies an oversight that occurred during the recent Control Center navigation overhaul.)
- **Configured media folders in Bulk Media Linker** — The Link Media to Sources wizard now offers to use media folders configured in Control Center → Preferences. Select from configured folders with checkboxes or switch to custom folder entry.

## Fixed

- **Table overflow in Bulk Media Linker** — Fixed table columns spilling outside the modal. Column widths are now properly proportioned.
- **Pagination in Bulk Media Linker** — Link step now shows 10 rows at a time with "Show more" and "Show all" buttons, preventing UI sluggishness with large file sets.
- **Focus loss in Media folder field** — Fixed input losing focus on every keystroke.
- **Individual Apply button per row** — Apply links one at a time from the Link step, with checkmark showing applied status.
- **Confidence dot alignment** — Indicator dots are now vertically aligned with filenames.
releases.name: Canvas Roots v0.17.4

releases.author: banisterious
releases.description:
## Bug Fixes

This release addresses several issues reported related to GEDCOM and Gramps imports.

### Import Fixes

- **Duplicate name wikilinks** - When importing GEDCOM files with duplicate names (e.g., two people named "John Smith"), relationship wikilinks now correctly point to the actual filenames (`[[John Smith]]` and `[[John Smith-1]]`) instead of all pointing to the same name.

- **Duplicate event filenames** - Fixed "File already exists" errors when importing files with multiple events that generate identical titles (e.g., multiple "Marriage of Unknown and Unknown" events). The importer now includes retry logic to handle race conditions with vault indexing.

- **Bases not created on import** - Bases files (people.base, places.base, etc.) are now created after import even when some errors occur. Previously, any import error would prevent bases creation.

### Timeline Fix

- **Missing space in timeline block** - Fixed missing space between event type and "in" preposition (e.g., "Bornin" now correctly displays as "Born in").

---

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/banisterious/obsidian-canvas-roots/compare/v0.17.2...v0.17.3
releases.name: Canvas Roots v0.17.3

releases.author: banisterious
releases.description:
## Resume Unsaved Work

Never lose your work again! All create entity modals (Person, Place, Event, Organization, Source) now automatically save form state when closed without saving. When you reopen a modal, you'll see a banner offering to restore your previous session's data or discard it.

- State persists for 24 hours
- Works across all five entity types
- Edit mode is excluded (you can always reopen the existing note)

## Bug Fixes

- **Base templates not created on import** - Import Wizard now auto-creates base templates (people, places, events, sources, organizations) after successful imports, matching the Control Center behavior.
- **Dynamic blocks not updating on frontmatter changes** - The `canvas-roots-media`, `canvas-roots-timeline`, and `canvas-roots-relationships` code blocks now automatically re-render when frontmatter properties are modified, without requiring the note to be closed and reopened.

## Changes

- **Dynamic block order** - When automatically added to person notes, dynamic code blocks now appear in the order: Media, Timeline, Relationships.
- **Dynamic blocks enabled by default** - The "Include dynamic blocks" option in Create Person modal is now enabled by default.
releases.name: Canvas Roots v0.17.2

releases.author: banisterious
releases.description:
## Excalidraw Export Enhancements

This release enhances the Excalidraw export with ExcalidrawAutomate API integration, style customization, and improved output quality.

### New Features

**Excalidraw Export Format** — The Generate Tree wizard now supports Excalidraw as an output format, creating hand-drawn style family tree diagrams.

- **Smart connectors** — Arrows adapt when you move elements (requires Excalidraw plugin)
- **Wiki links** — Click nodes to navigate directly to person notes
- **Spouse styling** — Spouse relationships rendered with dashed lines for visual distinction
- **Rich labels** — Nodes display name, dates, and birthplace

**Style Customization** — Dedicated Excalidraw Style step in the wizard with full control over appearance:

| Option | Choices |
|--------|---------|
| Drawing style | Architect (clean), Artist (sketchy), Cartoonist (rough) |
| Font family | Virgil (handwritten), Cascadia (code), system fonts |
| Fill style | Solid, Hachure, Cross-hatch |
| Stroke style | Solid, Dashed, Dotted |
| Node content | Name only, Name + dates, Name + dates + places |

### Changes

- **Context menu simplified** — Single "Generate visual tree" entry replaces separate Canvas/Excalidraw options
- **Default canvas name** — Wizard now pre-populates with "Family Tree"

### Requirements

- [Excalidraw plugin](https://github.com/zsviczian/obsidian-excalidraw-plugin) recommended for full feature set
- Works without Excalidraw using JSON fallback (static arrows, no wiki links)

---

**Full Changelog**: See [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/banisterious/obsidian-canvas-roots/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md) for details.
releases.name: Canvas Roots v0.17.1

releases.author: banisterious
releases.description:
# Data Cleanup Bundle

This release introduces a guided **Post-Import Cleanup Wizard** and migrates source citations to an array format, making it easier to maintain data quality and manage genealogical evidence.

## Highlights

### Post-Import Cleanup Wizard

A 10-step guided workflow that consolidates post-import data quality operations into a single, sequential experience.

- **10 sequential steps** covering all cleanup operations in the correct order
- **Progress tracking** with visual status indicators for each step
- **Session persistence** — close and resume later without losing progress
- **Preview before apply** — see proposed changes before modifying files
- **Skip/reset options** — skip irrelevant steps or re-run completed ones

**Steps:** Quality Report → Bidirectional Relationships → Date Normalization → Sex Normalization → Orphan References → Source Migration → Place Standardization → Geocoding → Place Hierarchy → Flatten Properties

**Access:** Control Center → Data Quality → "Cleanup Wizard" or via Command Palette

### Source Array Migration

Migrates source citations from indexed properties to YAML arrays for better scalability.

**Before:**

```yaml
source: "[[Birth Certificate]]"
source_2: "[[Census 1920]]"
source_3: "[[Family Bible]]"
```

**After:**

```yaml
sources:
  - "[[Birth Certificate]]"
  - "[[Census 1920]]"
  - "[[Family Bible]]"
```

- Unlimited sources per entity (no more 3-slot limit)
- Simpler Dataview queries — filter on a single array property
- Automatic migration via Step 6 of the Cleanup Wizard
- Deprecation warnings shown when viewing notes with old format

### Breaking Changes

- **Indexed source properties no longer read:** Notes using `source`, `source_2`, `source_3` must be migrated to `sources: []` array format. Use the Cleanup Wizard (Step 6) to migrate automatically.
releases.name: Canvas Roots v0.17.0

releases.author: banisterious
releases.description:
## Added

- **Expandable parse warnings** - Import wizard Step 4 (Preview) now shows a clickable warning section with chevron icon. Click to expand and view up to 10 warning details, with "...and X more" shown if there are additional warnings.

## Fixed

- **Duplicate event detection in Gramps import** - Gramps importer now detects and skips duplicate events (same type + person + date) that may exist in the source file. Duplicate count is displayed in the import summary.

- **Progress reporting for relationships phase** - Gramps import progress indicator now updates during the relationship linking phase, which previously showed no progress while relationships were being established.

- **Media block missing from dynamic blocks** - All importers (GEDCOM, Gramps, CSV, GEDCOM X) now include the media block in person notes by default. Previously only timeline and relationships blocks were created.

releases.author: banisterious
releases.description:
## What's New

### Import/Export Hub & Wizards

The Import/Export functionality has been completely redesigned with step-by-step wizards:

- **Import Wizard** (7 steps): Format → File → Options → Preview → Import → Numbering → Complete
- **Export Wizard** (6 steps): Format → Folders → Options → Preview → Export → Complete

### Reports Hub

New hub modal providing card-based access to both Narrative Reports and Visual Charts from a single entry point.

### Control Center Navigation Redesign

The sidebar has been reorganized into logical groups with dividers:

- **Entities**: People, Events, Places, Sources, Organizations, Universes, Collections
- **Data & Structure**: Data Quality, Schemas, Relationships
- **Output**: Canvas Trees, Maps
- **Tools**: Templates, Media Manager, Family Chart, Reports, Import/Export
- **Settings**: Preferences

Tool entries now open modals or dedicated views (indicated by ↗) instead of switching tab content.

### Removed

- **Guide tab** — Content moved to [wiki](https://github.com/banisterious/obsidian-canvas-roots/wiki)
- **Statistics tab** — Use Dashboard → Open Statistics for the dedicated Statistics leaf
- **Import/Export tab** — Replaced by the Import/Export Hub in Tools group

### Fixed

- **Excalidraw output format** - Generate Tree wizard now includes Excalidraw as an output format, which was inadvertently omitted from the initial unified wizard implementation in an earlier release. Creates hand-drawn style diagrams that can be annotated and exported to SVG or PNG via the Excalidraw plugin.

---

See the full [CHANGELOG](https://github.com/banisterious/obsidian-canvas-roots/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md) for details.
releases.name: Canvas Roots v0.16.0

releases.author: banisterious
releases.description:
## Report Wizard & ODT Export

### New Features

**Report Wizard Modal**
The Report Generator has been redesigned as a multi-step wizard for a streamlined experience:
- **5-step workflow**: Report Type → Subject → Content Options → Output & Styling → Generate
- **Category filtering**: Filter reports by category (Genealogical, Research, Timeline, Geographic, Summary)
- **Dynamic options**: Content options adapt based on selected report type
- **Format selection**: Choose between Vault, Markdown, PDF, or ODT output

**ODT Export for Reports**
Export all 13 report types as OpenDocument Text (.odt) files:
- Compatible with LibreOffice Writer and Microsoft Word
- Optional cover page with title, subtitle, and notes
- Rich content preserved (tables, lists, formatting)
- Enables merging text reports with visual tree charts

**ODT Export for Visual Trees**
The unified tree wizard now supports ODT output:
- ODT option in Step 3 (Output Format)
- Title field for document title and filename
- Tree image embedded in the ODT document

**Visual Tree PDF Quality Improvements**
Crisp, sharp PDF output for Visual Tree exports:
- Increased canvas scale from 2× to 4× for higher resolution
- Aspect ratio preservation (removed height constraint)
- Quality now matches Family Chart PDF exports

### Changed

- Report Generator modal replaced with wizard-style interface
- Improved step-by-step navigation with Previous/Next buttons

### Full Changelog

See [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/banisterious/obsidian-canvas-roots/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md) for complete details.
releases.name: Canvas Roots v0.15.3

releases.author: banisterious
releases.description:
## Calendarium Integration Phase 2 & Universe Discoverability

This release completes Calendarium Integration Phase 2 and improves universe management discoverability.

### Highlights

**Calendarium Integration Phase 2**
- **Display `fc-*` dated events on timelines** - Events with `fc-date` and `fc-end` fields now appear on person and place timelines
- **Calendar filter dropdown** - Filter timeline events by calendar when multiple calendars exist
- **Date range support** - Properly handles `fc-end` for lifespans, reign periods, and residences
- **0-indexed month conversion** - Correctly converts Calendarium's 0-indexed months to standard format

**Universe Management**
- **Create universe command** - New command palette entry (`Ctrl/Cmd+P` → "Canvas Roots: Create universe") for quick access
- **Universes tab always visible** - No longer hidden until you create your first universe
- **Quick Actions tiles** - New tile bar with Create Universe, Date Systems, and Custom Maps shortcuts

**Import Improvements**
- **Preserve media folder structure** - New toggle in Gramps .gpkg import recreates original subfolder hierarchy instead of flattening all media into one folder
- **Link media action** - New action in People tab opens Media Manager for browsing and linking media files

**UI Reorganization**
- Canvas layout and styling settings moved from Preferences to Canvas Trees tab for better context

### Bug Fixes
- Fixed dynamic media gallery block not being created during GEDCOM/Gramps import when "Include dynamic content blocks" was enabled

---

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/banisterious/obsidian-canvas-roots/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md
releases.name: Canvas Roots v0.15.2

releases.author: banisterious
releases.description:
## Family Chart Export Wizard & Styling

This release introduces a polished export experience for Family Chart with a multi-step wizard, ODT format support, and in-view color theming.

### Highlights

**Export Wizard** - The export button now opens a guided wizard with 5 quick presets:
- **Quick Share** - PNG at 1x, no avatars
- **High Quality** - PNG at 2x, with avatars  
- **Print Ready** - PDF with cover page
- **Editable** - SVG vector format
- **Document** - ODT for merging with reports

**ODT Export** - Create OpenDocument Text files that can be opened in LibreOffice Writer or Microsoft Word. Merge family charts with narrative text to create comprehensive family history documents.

**Styling Panel** - New palette button in the toolbar for quick color theme switching:
- 5 preset themes: Classic, Pastel, Earth Tones, High Contrast, Monochrome
- Customize modal with color pickers for all 7 chart colors
- Live preview as you adjust

**Progress Tracking** - Real-time export progress with phase indicators and cancel button.

### Also in this release

- Export settings (format, scale, options) are remembered for next export
- Gramps XML/.gpkg import now has "Include dynamic content blocks" toggle (matching GEDCOM)
- Chart colors apply on initialization, not just when changed via styling panel

### Links

- [Family Chart View documentation](https://github.com/banisterious/obsidian-canvas-roots/wiki/Family-Chart-View)
- [Full changelog](https://github.com/banisterious/obsidian-canvas-roots/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md)
releases.name: Canvas Roots v0.15.1

releases.author: banisterious
releases.description:
## Universal Media Linking

This release extends media support across all entity types and adds dynamic inline galleries for person notes.

### New Features

**Universal Media Property**
- The `media` property now works on Person, Event, Place, and Organization notes (previously Source-only)
- Link photos, portraits, documents, and scanned records to any entity type
- First media item serves as thumbnail on Family Chart person cards

**Gramps Package Import**
- Import `.gpkg` files with bundled media extraction
- Media files are copied to your configured attachments folder
- Automatic linking via `media` frontmatter based on Gramps `objref` references
- Works for Person, Event, Place, and Source entities

**Dynamic Media Gallery**
- New `canvas-roots-media` code block renders inline galleries in reading view
- Configurable columns (2-6 or auto), thumbnail size (small/medium/large), and custom titles
- **Editable mode**: Set `editable: true` to drag-and-reorder media items
- **Freeze to callout**: Click ❄️ to convert to a static `[!info|cr-frozen-gallery]` callout
- Styling customizable via Style Settings plugin

**Linked Media Gallery Modal**
- New modal for browsing and managing media linked to a note
- Visual grid view of all attached media files

**Bulk Media Link**
- New tool to link multiple media files to notes in batch
- Match media to notes by filename patterns or manual selection

**Find Unlinked Media**
- New Dashboard tile to discover orphaned media files in your vault
- Media folder filtering settings to limit which folders are scanned

### Changed

- Import wizards now include media blocks when "Include dynamic blocks" is enabled
- "Insert dynamic blocks" adds the media gallery alongside timeline and relationships

### Fixed

- ESLint compliance for Obsidian plugin review requirements

### Documentation

- Updated Frontmatter Reference with media property for all entity types
- New "Person Card Avatars" section in Family Chart View documentation
- Developer docs for Gramps media linking implementation
releases.name: Canvas Roots v0.15.0

releases.author: banisterious
releases.description:
## Visual Tree Charts & Unified Wizard

This release introduces printable PDF tree diagrams and consolidates tree generation into a single unified wizard.

### New Features

**Visual Tree Charts**
- Generate printable PDF tree diagrams with positioned boxes and connecting lines
- Four chart types: Pedigree (ancestors), Descendant, Hourglass (both directions), and Fan Chart (semicircular)
- PDF options: page size (Letter/A4/Legal/Tabloid/A3), orientation, node content, color schemes
- Large tree handling with auto-scale, auto-page-size, or generation limiting

**Unified Tree Wizard**
- Single wizard for both Canvas and PDF tree generation
- Dynamic step flow branches based on output format selection
- Tree type badges in step headers for clear context during navigation
- Replaces previous separate wizards for a streamlined experience

**Statistics Dashboard Improvements**
- New "Visual Trees" section dedicated to PDF tree generation
- Separate from text-based reports for clearer organization
- Custom tree icons for each chart type (`cr-pedigree-tree`, `cr-descendant-tree`, `cr-hourglass-tree`, `cr-fan-chart`)

**Control Center Updates**
- "Tree Output" tab renamed to "Canvas Trees"
- Now uses the unified wizard for "New Tree" button
- Same wizard accessed from Statistics Dashboard and Control Center

### What's Changed

- Statistics Dashboard reorganized with Visual Trees as its own expandable section
- Report count increased from 13 to 17 with the 4 new visual tree types
- Deprecated and removed old separate wizard modals (~2000 lines consolidated)

### Full Changelog

See [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/banisterious/obsidian-canvas-roots/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md) for complete details.

releases.author: banisterious
releases.description:
## Extended Report Types

This release adds **6 new report types** expanding the report generator beyond traditional genealogical reports, plus enhanced PDF customization options.

### New Report Types

| Report | Category | Description |
|--------|----------|-------------|
| **Source Summary** | Research | All sources cited for a person, grouped by fact type with quality ratings and gap analysis |
| **Timeline Report** | Timeline | Chronological list of events with filtering by date range, event type, and participants |
| **Place Summary** | Geographic | All events and people at a location (born, died, resided, married) with hierarchy display |
| **Media Inventory** | Research | Media files with linked entities, orphaned file detection, coverage gaps |
| **Universe Overview** | Summary | Entity statistics for a fictional world with date ranges and entity type breakdown |
| **Collection Overview** | Summary | Summary of a user collection or family component with member list and statistics |

### Report Category Selector

Reports are now organized into categories for easier discovery:

- **Genealogical** — Ahnentafel, Pedigree Chart, Descendant Chart, Register Report, Family Group Sheet, Individual Summary
- **Research** — Source Summary, Gaps Report, Media Inventory
- **Timeline** — Timeline Report
- **Geographic** — Place Summary
- **Summary** — Universe Overview, Collection Overview

### Enhanced PDF Options

- **Custom title** — Override default report titles
- **Title scope** — Apply custom title to cover page only, headers only, or both
- **Custom subtitle** — Add subtitle text below the main title on cover pages
- **Cover notes** — Add extended notes section to cover pages for context or instructions
- **Date format** — Choose between MDY (12/20/2025), DMY (20/12/2025), or YMD (2025-12-20)

### For Worldbuilders

The new **Universe Overview** and **Collection Overview** reports are designed for fiction writers and worldbuilders:

- Generate comprehensive statistics for fictional worlds
- Document entity breakdowns, date ranges, and geographic coverage
- Summarize user-defined collections or auto-detected family components

---

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/banisterious/obsidian-canvas-roots/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md

**Documentation**: [Statistics & Reports Wiki](https://github.com/banisterious/obsidian-canvas-roots/wiki/Statistics-And-Reports)
releases.name: Canvas Roots v0.13.5

releases.author: banisterious
releases.description:
### PDF Report Export

The report generator now supports PDF export. Access it via:
- **Statistics Dashboard** → Reports section → Generate
- **Command Palette** → "Canvas Roots: Generate Report"

All 7 report types are available:

- **Ahnentafel Report** — Numbered ancestor list
- **Family Group Sheet** — Parents, marriage, and children
- **Individual Summary** — Complete person record with events
- **Gaps Report** — Missing data analysis
- **Register Report** — NGSQ-style descendant numbering
- **Pedigree Chart** — ASCII ancestor tree
- **Descendant Chart** — ASCII descendant tree

Select "Download as PDF" in the output method dropdown to generate a professionally styled PDF document.

### PDF Options

- **Page size** — Choose between A4 and Letter
- **Cover page** — Optional title page with report name, subject, generation date, and plugin branding
- **Logo/crest** — Add a custom image to the cover page (family crest, coat of arms, etc.)

### Privacy First

PDFs are generated **100% locally** on your device:

- No internet connection required
- No data sent to any server
- Fonts are embedded in the plugin
- Files download to your system's Downloads folder

Your family data never leaves your computer.

---

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/banisterious/obsidian-canvas-roots/compare/v0.13.3...v0.13.4
releases.name: Canvas Roots v0.13.4

releases.author: banisterious
releases.description:
## Improved UX for Reference Number Assignment

The person picker modal now provides context-specific guidance when assigning reference numbers. Instead of a generic "Select person" prompt, you'll see clear explanations tailored to each numbering system:

- **Ahnentafel**: "Select root person — This person will be #1; ancestors are numbered upward"
- **d'Aboville/Henry**: "Select progenitor — This person will be 1; descendants are numbered downward"
- **Generation**: "Select reference person — This person will be generation 0"

## Bug Fixes

- **Source media linker dropdown styling** — Fixed a dropdown styling conflict in the "Link media to existing sources" wizard that caused visual issues with certain themes and on Linux with GTK styling.

## Housekeeping

- Removed ~600 lines of dead code from the legacy GEDCOM v1 importer (superseded by the streaming v2 implementation)
- Polished Guide tab card footer links with consistent separator styling
releases.name: Canvas Roots v0.13.3

releases.author: banisterious
releases.description:
## Default Root Person for Family Chart

Set a default person for Family Chart by marking them with `root_person: true` in their frontmatter.

**How it works:**
- Right-click a person note and select "Mark as root person"
- Opening Family Chart will automatically load their tree (no picker prompt)
- Marking a new person as root automatically unmarks the previous one
- The Family Chart view updates live when you change the root person marking

## Place Linking for Birth/Death Locations

The Create Person modal now supports linking birth and death places to existing place notes, using the same pattern as family relationships (father/mother/spouse).

**How it works:**
- Click "Link" next to Birth place or Death place to open the place picker
- Search and filter places by name or category (real, fictional, historical, etc.)
- If the place doesn't exist, click "Create new place" to create it on-the-fly
- Places are stored with dual fields (`birth_place` + `birth_place_id`) for reliable resolution

**Form improvements:**
- Birth date and birth place are now grouped together
- Death date and death place are now grouped together
- Works from both Control Center and the context menu "Edit person" option
releases.name: Canvas Roots v0.13.2

releases.author: banisterious
releases.description:
## Family Chart Enhancements

This release adds several new Family Chart features and polishes the reference numbering experience.

### New Features

**Family Chart improvements:**
- **Horizontal orientation** — Switch between vertical (top-to-bottom) and horizontal (left-to-right) tree layouts
- **Depth limits** — Control how many generations are displayed (1-5 or unlimited) for both ancestors and descendants independently
- **Display options** — New visibility controls including show/hide siblings, unknown parent placeholders, sort children by birth date, and hide living persons (privacy mode)
- **Reorganized toolbar** — Split the Layout menu into three focused menus: Layout, Display, and Depth

### Improvements

- **Reference numbers modal** — Redesigned with icons, clearer descriptions explaining what each numbering system is best for, person count preview, and Learn more link to documentation

### Bug Fixes

- **Info panel reset** — Fixed bug where the Family Chart info panel continued showing the previous person's details when switching root person via context menu
- **Reference numbers prompt** — All import types (GEDCOM, GEDCOM X, Gramps, CSV) now consistently show the "Assign reference numbers" prompt after successful imports

---

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/banisterious/obsidian-canvas-roots/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md
releases.name: Canvas Roots v0.13.1

releases.author: banisterious
releases.description:
## Universe Management

This release introduces first-class **Universe Notes** for organizing fictional worlds, making Canvas Roots a more powerful tool for worldbuilders alongside genealogists.

### New Features

- **Universe Notes** - Create universe notes to organize fictional worlds with metadata (name, author, genre, status), linked custom calendars, maps, and validation schemas
- **Universe Wizard** - Guided setup wizard walks you through creating a universe with optional calendar, map, and schema
- **Universe Notes Card** - New table-based UI in Control Center matching the Person notes pattern with filter/sort/search and row interactions
- **Orphan Universe Detection** - Automatically detect universe values referenced by entities but lacking corresponding notes; create notes with matching cr_id to preserve references
- **Universes Base Template** - New base template for spreadsheet-like universe management
- **Folder-Type Context Menus** - Context menu actions now adapt to folder type (People, Places, Universes, etc.) showing only relevant actions

### Improvements

- **Statistics Tab** - Universes card redesigned with Setting-style layout
- **Create All Bases** - Now creates all six base files including Universes
- **Auto-Create Bases on Import** - Bases automatically created after GEDCOM/Gramps imports

### Bug Fixes

- Handle numeric date values (e.g., `born: 1845`) in frontmatter that YAML parses as numbers instead of strings
- **Data Quality Analysis** - Fixed crash when analyzing data with non-string date values from Gramps XML imports
- **Edit Universe Button** - Now opens EditUniverseModal instead of just opening the file
- **Delete Universe** - Added delete action to context menus with confirmation dialog

### Documentation

- New [Universe Notes](https://github.com/banisterious/obsidian-canvas-roots/wiki/Universe-Notes) wiki page
- Updated [Frontmatter Reference](https://github.com/banisterious/obsidian-canvas-roots/wiki/Frontmatter-Reference) with universe properties
- Updated [Getting Started](https://github.com/banisterious/obsidian-canvas-roots/wiki/Getting-Started) with worldbuilder quick start guide

---

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/banisterious/obsidian-canvas-roots/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md
releases.name: Canvas Roots v0.13.0

releases.author: banisterious
releases.description:
## Improved Family Chart UX

This release introduces a new **info panel** for the Family Chart view, replacing the previous hidden edit mode toggle with a more discoverable and intuitive interface.

**New Info Panel:**
- Click any person card to open a details panel on the right
- View person information (name, birth date, death date) in read-only mode
- Click "Edit" to switch to edit mode with input fields
- Save or Cancel to commit or discard changes
- Navigate to related people via clickable relationship links (Parents, Spouses, Children)
- "Open note" link to jump directly to the person's markdown file

**Preserved Zoom:**
- Clicking a person card no longer resets the zoom level or re-centers the view
- Your current pan and zoom position is maintained when opening the info panel

releases.name: Canvas Roots v0.12.14

releases.author: banisterious
releases.description:
## Fixed

- **Duplicate children_id during Gramps import** - Fixed a race condition where the bidirectional sync file watcher was adding relationship IDs while import was still in progress, causing duplicate `children_id` entries. All import operations (Gramps, GEDCOM, GEDCOM X, CSV) now disable bidirectional sync during the import process.

## Added

- **Log export button** - New "Export logs" button in Developer settings allows saving the current session log to a file with optional obfuscation of personal data. Useful for debugging and sharing logs when reporting issues.
releases.name: Canvas Roots v0.12.13

releases.author: banisterious
releases.description:
## What's New in v0.12.12

### Configurable Sex Normalization

The **"Normalize sex values"** batch operation in **Control Center → Data Quality** now supports configurable behavior. A new setting in **Preferences → Data Quality** offers three modes:

| Mode | Behavior |
|------|----------|
| **Standard** | Normalize all values to GEDCOM M/F (default, existing behavior) |
| **Schema-aware** | Skip notes covered by schemas with custom sex enum values |
| **Disabled** | Never normalize (preview still shows what would change) |

**Schema-aware mode** is designed for worldbuilders who define custom sex values (e.g., `["male", "female", "neuter", "hermaphrodite"]` for alien species) in a [schema](https://github.com/banisterious/obsidian-canvas-roots/wiki/Schema-Validation#data-quality-integration). When running "Normalize sex values", notes with such schemas are skipped, preserving custom values while genealogy notes continue to normalize to GEDCOM standards.

### GEDCOM-Standard Canonical Values

The "Normalize sex values" operation now uses GEDCOM-standard canonical forms: `M`, `F`, `X`, `U`. Built-in synonyms automatically map common values without requiring manual configuration:

- `male`, `man`, `boy` → `M`
- `female`, `woman`, `girl` → `F`
- `nonbinary`, `non-binary`, `nb`, `intersex` → `X`
- `unknown`, `?` → `U`

### Bug Fixes

- **Edit Person modal universe field** — Fixed universe dropdown not appearing when opening Edit Person modal from file explorer context menu. The modal now correctly loads existing universes from both place and person notes.
- **Sex value normalization** — "Normalize sex values" now works out of the box with built-in mappings. Previously required manual value alias configuration to detect any changes.

### Technical

- Fixed 18 ESLint errors across report generators and UI components

---

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/banisterious/obsidian-canvas-roots/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md
releases.name: Canvas Roots v0.12.12

releases.author: banisterious
releases.description:
## Tree Output Tab Redesign

The Tree Output tab now features a two-panel layout with configuration options on the left and a sticky preview/generate panel on the right. The Root person picker is more compact with inline radio buttons showing names and dates on a single line. 

## Bug Fixes

- Fixed setting labels in Tree Output accordions being truncated
- Fixed Data completeness labels in Statistics tab wrapping mid-word
releases.name: Canvas Roots v0.12.11

releases.author: banisterious
releases.description:
## Step & Adoptive Parent Support

This release adds comprehensive support for non-biological parent relationships, improving import/export fidelity across all formats and enabling more accurate representation of blended families.

### New Features

**Import Support**

- **GEDCOM 5.5.1** - Parse `PEDI` tags (`birth`, `step`, `adop`, `foster`) from FAMC references. Step-parents and adoptive parents are imported to dedicated frontmatter fields. Biological parent conflicts are no longer triggered by step/adoptive relationships.
- **Gramps XML** - Parse `mrel` and `frel` attributes from `<childref>` elements. Relationship types mapped: `Birth` → biological, `Stepchild` → step-parent, `Adopted` → adoptive parent.
- **GEDCOM X (JSON)** - Parse lineage type facts (`BiologicalParent`, `StepParent`, `AdoptiveParent`, `FosterParent`, `GuardianParent`) from parent-child relationships.

**Export Support (Round-Trip)**

- **GEDCOM 5.5.1** - Export step-parents with `PEDI step` and adoptive parents with `PEDI adop` under FAMC references.
- **Gramps XML** - Export step-parent relationships with `mrel="Stepchild"` / `frel="Stepchild"` and adoptive parents with `mrel="Adopted"` / `frel="Adopted"` on childref elements.
- **GEDCOM X (JSON)** - Export ParentChild relationships with `StepParent` or `AdoptiveParent` lineage type facts.

**Canvas Tree Visualization**
- Step-parent relationships shown with **dashed lines**
- Adoptive parent relationships shown with **dotted lines**
- New toggles in tree generation: "Include step-parents" and "Include adoptive parents"
- Relationship labels displayed on non-biological parent edges

**Create/Edit Person Modal**
- New "Step & adoptive parents" section for manual entry
- Fields for stepfather, stepmother, adoptive father, and adoptive mother

**Statistics & Reports**
- Parent type breakdown in Data Completeness section (biological vs. step vs. adoptive)
- New quality metrics: "Biologically orphaned" (no biological parents but has step/adoptive)
- Blended family insights showing count of people with multiple parent types

### New Frontmatter Fields

```yaml
stepfather_id: [cr_id_1, cr_id_2]  # Can have multiple
stepmother_id: [cr_id_1]
adoptive_father_id: cr_id
adoptive_mother_id: cr_id
```

### Technical Details

- New built-in relationship types: `step_parent`, `step_child`, `adoptive_parent`, `adopted_child`
- Property aliases added for all new fields
- Step/adoptive parents included in full tree traversal by default
- Ancestor trees do not recurse through non-biological parents (preserves bloodline focus)
- Full round-trip fidelity: import → edit → export preserves pedigree types across all three formats


Key changes:
1. Updated intro to mention "import/export fidelity across all formats"
2. Restructured the import section with clear format headers
3. Added new "Export Support (Round-Trip)" section detailing all three formats
4. Added final bullet point about round-trip fidelity in Technical Details
releases.name: Canvas Roots v0.12.10

releases.author: banisterious
releases.description:
## Statistics & Reports

This release adds a comprehensive [Statistics Dashboard](https://github.com/banisterious/obsidian-canvas-roots/wiki/Statistics-And-Reports) and report generation system for analyzing and documenting your genealogical data.

### Statistics Dashboard

A new workspace view accessible from Control Center → Statistics tab or via command palette:

- **Entity overview** - Counts for people, events, sources, places, organizations, and canvases with date range spanning all entities
- **Data completeness** - Progress bars showing percentage of people with birth/death dates, sources, and family links
- **Data quality** - Severity-coded alerts (error/warning/info) for issues like date inconsistencies, missing data, and orphaned records. Click any issue to expand and see affected people with right-click context menu and hover preview
- **Gender distribution** - Visual breakdown with percentages
- **Top lists** - Interactive lists for surnames, locations, occupations, and sources with drill-down to matching people

### Extended Statistics

Demographic analysis for deeper research insights:

- **Longevity analysis** - Average, median, min/max lifespan by birth decade and location
- **Family size patterns** - Average children per family with distribution chart
- **Marriage patterns** - Age at first marriage by sex, remarriage rates
- **Migration flows** - Birth-to-death location changes with top routes
- **Source coverage** - Coverage percentage by generation depth
- **Timeline density** - Events per decade with gap detection

### Genealogical Reports

Generate formatted reports from the dashboard:

- **Family Group Sheet** - Single family unit with parents, marriage, and children
- **Individual Summary** - Complete record of one person with all events and sources
- **Ahnentafel Report** - Numbered ancestor list (1=subject, 2=father, 3=mother, etc.)
- **Gaps Report** - Analysis of missing data by category
- **Register Report** - Descendants with NGSQ-style numbering
- **Pedigree Chart** - Ancestor tree in markdown format
- **Descendant Chart** - Descendant tree in markdown format

### Other Changes

- **Family Chart "Open note" button** - Person cards in the Family Chart view now have a small button in the top-right corner that opens the person's note in a new tab. Works in both view and edit modes, providing quick access to notes without changing the card click behavior.

### Bug Fixes

- Fixed orphaned people calculation showing negative values due to incorrect set operations
releases.name: Canvas Roots v0.12.9

releases.author: banisterious
releases.description:
## Dynamic Content Blocks ✨

This release introduces **live, computed content blocks** for person notes:

- **Timeline block** (`canvas-roots-timeline`) - Shows a chronological list of all events for a person, including birth, death, marriages, residences, and more
- **Relationships block** (`canvas-roots-relationships`) - Displays family members (parents, spouse, children) with clickable wikilinks

Both blocks render dynamically based on your vault's data and include a toolbar button to "freeze" the content to static markdown if needed.

**Ways to add dynamic blocks:**
- Toggle in Create Person modal when creating new people
- Toggle in GEDCOM/Gramps/CSV import wizards
- Context menu: right-click a person note → "Insert dynamic blocks"
- Command palette: "Insert dynamic blocks" (single note or bulk folder)

## Bug Fixes

**Family Chart improvements:**
- Fixed zoom buttons showing "NaN%" and causing the chart to vanish
- Fixed "Open family chart" showing a previously loaded person instead of the current note
- Fixed chart opening in sidebar instead of main workspace

---

**Full Changelog:** [0.12.7...0.12.8](https://github.com/banisterious/obsidian-canvas-roots/compare/v0.12.7...v0.12.8)
releases.name: Canvas Roots v0.12.8

releases.author: banisterious
releases.description:
## Improvements

- **Unified Age formula** - People base template now uses a single intelligent `age` formula that shows current age for living people, lifespan for deceased, and respects your configured age threshold (Preferences → Privacy & Export). Living/Deceased view filters also use this threshold.

## Family Chart improvements

- Added property alias support for `cr_id` resolution
- Removed 2-second delay on live note updates
- Added deduplication for duplicate relationship entries in frontmatter

## Bug Fixes

- Fixed family chart showing wrong/previous person instead of current note
- **Duplicate child/children property fix** - Fixed inconsistent property naming where Gramps import created `child` property but other tools used `children`, causing duplicate properties. All components now consistently use canonical property names.
- **Family Chart crash** - Fixed "child has more than 1 parent" error when opening Family Chart after importing data with parent-child relationship inconsistencies. The chart now validates bidirectional relationships, only including children who explicitly reference the parent back. Also optimized relationship validation to use O(1) lookups instead of repeated service calls, preventing UI freezes with large datasets (600+ people).
releases.name: Canvas Roots v0.12.7

releases.author: banisterious
releases.description:
# Gramps Source Import

This release completes the Gramps migration path by adding full source and citation import support.

## What's New

### Gramps Source Import

Gramps XML import now creates source notes from `<sources>` and `<citations>` elements:

- **Citation linking** - Sources are linked to events via citation references
- **Repository metadata** - Imports `repository`, `repository_type`, and `source_medium` from Gramps repository records
- **Media references** - Stores Gramps media handles in `gramps_media_refs` for manual resolution via Source Media Gallery
- **ID preservation** - Stores `gramps_handle` and `gramps_id` for re-import scenarios

### Source Property Aliases

Source properties are now part of the property alias system. Customize property names for source notes (e.g., `creator` instead of `author`, `archive` instead of `repository`). Configure in **Preferences → Property aliases → Source properties**.

### Improved Gramps Import UX

- **Progress indicator** - Import now shows a progress modal with phase indicators and running statistics
- **Obsidian-style toggles** - Import options use native toggles for "Create source notes", "Create place notes", and "Create event notes"

## Bug Fixes

- **Compressed .gramps files** - Fixed import of gzip-compressed `.gramps` files exported from Gramps 6.x. The importer now automatically detects and decompresses these files.

---

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/banisterious/obsidian-canvas-roots/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md
releases.name: Canvas Roots v0.12.6

releases.author: banisterious
releases.description:
## Bulk Source-Image Linking

This release adds two powerful wizards for managing source images, addressing a common genealogist workflow of organizing and linking scanned documents and photos.

### New Features

#### Source Image Import Wizard
Import a folder of source images and automatically create source notes with parsed metadata.

- **Filename parsing** — Extracts surnames, years, record types, and locations from common naming patterns
- **Confidence indicators** — Visual dots (🟢🟡🟠) show parsing quality so you can prioritize review
- **Editable metadata** — Review and correct parsed data before import
- **Multi-part grouping** — Automatically groups `_p1`/`_p2`, `_a`/`_b` suffixes into single source notes

**Access:** Control Center → Sources tab → **Import** button

#### Source Media Linker Wizard
Attach images to existing source notes that don't have media (e.g., sources imported via GEDCOM).

- **Smart suggestions** — Scores potential matches based on filename analysis
- **Auto-selection** — Top suggestion pre-selected with confidence indicator
- **"+N more" badge** — Shows when alternative suggestions exist
- **Row highlighting** — Yellow background highlights files needing manual selection
- **Summary breakdown** — Shows "X auto-matched, Y need manual selection"

**Access:** Control Center → Sources tab → **Link** button

### Recognized Filename Patterns

The parser recognizes common genealogy naming conventions:

| Pattern | Extracted Data |
|---------|----------------|
| `smith_census_1900.jpg` | Surname: Smith, Type: census, Year: 1900 |
| `henderson_obituary_1945.jpg` | Surname: Henderson, Type: obituary, Year: 1945 |
| `Marriage Cert Boston 1875.jpeg` | Type: marriage, Location: Boston, Year: 1875 |

**Recognized keywords:** census, birth, death, marriage, divorce, military, draft, wwi, wwii, immigration, naturalization, obituary, will, probate, cemetery, baptism, and more.

### Documentation

- [Evidence & Sources wiki page](https://github.com/banisterious/obsidian-canvas-roots/wiki/Evidence-And-Sources) — Full documentation for both wizards
- [Release History](https://github.com/banisterious/obsidian-canvas-roots/wiki/Release-History#bulk-source-image-linking-v0125) — Technical details
releases.name: Canvas Roots v0.12.5

releases.author: banisterious
releases.description:
## Bug Fixes

- **GEDCOM Export**: Fixed FAMS/FAMC family references not being included in individual records. Family structures are now properly extracted before building person records, ensuring correct spouse (FAMS) and child (FAMC) linkages.

## Enhancements

- **Gramps Export**: Added family back-references (`childof`/`parentin`) to person records for proper family linking
- **Gramps Export**: Places referenced in events are now included even when not defined in the Place Graph
- **Gramps Export**: Place types are inferred from name patterns (e.g., "Smith County" → County) when not explicitly set
releases.name: Canvas Roots v0.12.4

releases.author: banisterious
releases.description:
## What's New

### Gramps Import Enhancements

- **Compressed file support**: Import `.gramps` files directly (gzip-compressed XML)
- **Place notes**: Optionally create place notes during import with automatic wikilinks in person notes
- **Event notes**: Optionally create event notes (birth, death, marriage, etc.) linked to persons and places
- **Improved UI**: Analysis now shows place and event counts with checkboxes to control what gets imported

### Import Options

When importing a Gramps file, you can now choose to create:
- Person notes (always)
- Place notes (optional) - links automatically added to person birth/death places
- Event notes (optional) - includes date, persons involved, and location

releases.author: banisterious
releases.description:
## Bug Fixes for Obsidian Bases Integration

This release fixes issues with the People base template when using Obsidian Bases:

### Fixed

- **Lifespan formula error** - Fixed "Cannot find function 'year' on type Date" error in the Lifespan calculated property by using correct Bases duration syntax.

- **Living/Deceased members views** - Fixed these views showing incorrect results when the `died` property exists but is empty. Also ensured the Name column displays properly.

**Note:** These fixes apply to newly generated People bases. To apply the fixes to an existing base, regenerate it using the "Create People base" command.
releases.name: Canvas Roots v0.12.2

releases.author: banisterious
releases.description:
## v0.12.1 - Bug Fixes & UX Improvements

### Changed

- **Family chart opens in main workspace** - "Open in family chart" now opens as a new tab in the main workspace instead of the sidebar, providing more screen space for viewing complex trees.
- **Context menu reorganization** - Moved "Open in family chart" into the "Generate tree" submenu for person notes, grouping all tree visualization options together.

### Fixed

- **cr_id prefix bug** - Fixed context menu actions incorrectly adding `place_` or `event_` prefixes to generated cr_id values.

- **Tree preview UI freeze** - Disabled tree preview for trees with more than 200 people to prevent UI freeze. Large trees show a notice with recommendation to generate the canvas directly.
- **Canvas generation freeze** - Trees with more than 200 people now automatically use D3 hierarchical layout instead of family-chart to prevent freezing.
- **Canvas folder setting ignored** - Generated canvas files now correctly use the configured "Canvases folder" setting.
- **Excalidraw export location** - Exported Excalidraw files now save to the vault root instead of the source file's parent folder.
